summary: Dark theme verification for Anonym X messenger. All 10+ screens tested and verified to use consistent dark theme (#0A0A0A background, #6C5CE7 primary, #1A1A1A surface). No white/light elements found. All screens properly styled including welcome, registration, login, main chats, settings, search, create group, PIN setup, group chat, and group management.
critical_code_review_comments: All screens use consistent COLORS object with dark theme values
Background color #0A0A0A applied consistently across all screens
Surface color #1A1A1A used for cards and input containers
Primary color #6C5CE7 used for buttons and highlights
Text colors properly set: #FFFFFF for primary text, #8E8E93 for secondary, #555555 for muted/placeholder
All input placeholders use textMuted (#555555) providing good contrast against dark surface
No white or light backgrounds found in any screen
Modal overlays properly styled with dark backgrounds
Status bar set to 'light' style for visibility on dark background

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 10 screens verified with dark theme

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark theme has been verified across all screens. COLORS object is defined consistently in each file with: background: #0A0A0A, surface: #1A1A1A, surfaceLight: #252525, primary: #6C5CE7, primaryLight: #A29BFE, text: #FFFFFF, textSecondary: #8E8E93, textMuted: #555555, border: #333333. All screens including welcome, auth (login/register), tabs (chats/settings), search, create-group, security (PIN setup/lock), chat, and group management use this color scheme.
